text: ...different again, would be on the bay or near the water where we could actually do some of the activities that we enjoy.
Because that way, when I do come home from work, close by the water, I can go fishing, you know, we can put the jet ski in the water.
Look at it! A beachfront home in Fort Lauderdale is going to really change our lives.
It's going to take out a lot of that stress that we feel from eating all of the time.
It's really going to make a very good, positive change in our lives.
Shania, are you a good swimmer?
